'''hagunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beader|beader]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-g-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beader|beader]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hagunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæginith|hæginith]] || [[word:hæginij|hæginij]] || [[word:hæginish|hæginish]] || [[word:hægini|hægini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hagugunuth|hagugunuth]] || [[word:hagugunuj|hagugunuj]] || [[word:hagugunush|hagugunush]] || [[word:hagugunu|hagugunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hagunuth|hagunuth]] || [[word:hagunuj|hagunuj]] || [[word:hagunush|hagunush]] || [[word:hagunu|hagunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hagufnuth|hagufnuth]] || [[word:hagufnuj|hagufnuj]] || [[word:hagufnush|hagufnush]] || [[word:hagufnuf|hagufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hagunuthu|hagunuthu]] || [[word:hagunuju|hagunuju]] || [[word:hagunushu|hagunushu]] || [[word:hagunuku|hagunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hagunuth|hagunuth]] || [[word:hagunuj|hagunuj]] || [[word:hagunush|hagunush]] || [[word:hagunu|hagunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hagunuthul|hagunuthul]] || [[word:hagunujul|hagunujul]] || [[word:hagunushul|hagunushul]] || [[word:hagunukul|hagunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hagunuthuthu|hagunuthuthu]] || [[word:hagunujuju|hagunujuju]] || [[word:hagunushushu|hagunushushu]] || [[word:hagunuku|hagunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hagunuthun|hagunuthun]] || [[word:hagunujun|hagunujun]] || [[word:hagunushun|hagunushun]] || [[word:hagunukun|hagunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hagunuthuoro|hagunuthuoro]] || [[word:hagunujuoro|hagunujuoro]] || [[word:hagunushuoro|hagunushuoro]] || [[word:hagunukuoro|hagunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
